entry.title: Re: Issue with long running PAL Function on HANA
entry.content: Yes, also when running it directly on hanadb, I still get the timeout.

entry.title: ATLAS 10.1 Change for Imports in Germany Deadline
entry.content:
German customs are saying the deadline of ATLAS 10.1 is 27.10.2024 for the import processes.  With SAP just releasing the OSS Note package within the last few weeks, has anyone been able to get an extension of the deadline?  We are right in the middle of converting from GTS 11.0 to GTS E4H 2023 and cannot meet the deadline.  Currently customs are saying they are providing no extensions of ATLAS 9.1.   

Has anyone been able to get an extension or heard of a possible push of the hard migration deadline by customs?

entry.title: Re: Unable to connect PostgreSQL DB with Visual Studio Cr...
entry.content:
Hi Mani,

In your code comment out the parameter and log on lines.

On the Viewer properties enable Refresh button:

Then run the app again and this time hit the Viewers Refresh button.

Now what do you see?

FYI, if the report is based on a Stored Procedure you must set the Parameter value before setting the log on info.

entry.title: Re: SCC handshake failed: 401 — Unauthorized
entry.content: Thank you Constantin, we had the same problem as the OP, and this worked for us!

entry.title: Re: Account assignment mandatory for material (enter acc....
entry.content:
while i'm creat  po  giveing all data  when click the enter that time gettig error so could not creat the po 

Account assignment mandatory for material 100007021 (enter acc. ass. cat.)

entry.title: Re: Failed to connect to sbocommon on installation
entry.content:
Hi OliveBee

Please try below mentioned solution:

Backup the SBO-Common database;
- Delete the SBO-Common database;
- Recreate the SBO Common from the Package file or Run the Upgrade wizard again, if the SBO-Common is missing the upgrade wizard will recreate it;

Once done, please try to start the installation wizard with "Run as Administrator" on the client machine and see if this helps to perform a successful installation? 

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh

entry.title: Re: Client-secret change in every CAP app deploy
entry.content: Because I have different clients such as UI5 and MDK app

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content: My submission for this task

entry.title: Re: Store & Manage your Document Attachments through Fiori
entry.content: Hi sunny5, did you find a solution for this? I am facing similar issue. Thanks and KR, Richard

entry.title: How to refresh screen with 2 grids?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
How to refresh a screen( not GRID ). I would provide some information about mine programm:
I have a screen with 2 grids in it : left - alv_tree, right-alv_grid. 
When i click to node of tree => Alv grid appears at the right side.
Also i have an custom button in mine AlvGrid Toolbar, after which i try to delete first record and refresh a screen, i
know i can do it with 'refresh_table_display', but is it possible to do with calling  sy-dynnnr with updated values?
I try this, but there are no changes at screen.

MODULE STATUS_1100 OUTPUT.
  SET PF-STATUS '1100'.
  SET TITLEBAR '1100'.

if split_cont is INITIAL.
  init=>init_tables( ).
endif.
init=>init_container( ).
ENDMODULE.
CLASS init DEFINITION.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    CLASS-METHODS : init_container,
                    init_tables.
ENDCLASS.                    "init DEFINITION


class lcl_controller DEFINITION FINAL.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS : ITEM_DOUBLE_CLICK
                  FOR EVENT ITEM_DOUBLE_CLICK OF cl_gui_alv_tree
                  IMPORTING node_key FIELDNAME.
ENDCLASS.                    "lcl_controller DEFINITION

*Класс контроллер для ALV
class control_of_alv DEFINITION FINAL.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS : handle_toolbar
                  FOR EVENT toolbar OF cl_gui_alv_grid
                  IMPORTING e_object e_interactive,
AFTER_USER_COMMAND FOR EVENT AFTER_USER_COMMAND of cl_gui_alv_grid
IMPORTING E_UCOMM,
  USER_COMMAND  FOR EVENT USER_COMMAND  of cl_gui_alv_grid
  IMPORTING e_ucomm.
ENDCLASS.

class lcl_controller IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD ITEM_DOUBLE_CLICK.

    w_variant-report = sy-repid.
    ls_layout-cwidth_opt = 'X'.
    ls_layout-grid_title = ''.

    case node_key.
      WHEN text-001.

        ls_layout-sel_mode = 'A'.
        CALL FUNCTION 'LVC_FIELDCATALOG_MERGE'
          EXPORTING
            I_STRUCTURE_NAME       = 'ZVA_VBELN_STATUS'
            I_BYPASSING_BUFFER     = 'X'
          CHANGING
            CT_FIELDCAT            = fieldcat_of_right
          EXCEPTIONS
            INCONSISTENT_INTERFACE = 1
            PROGRAM_ERROR          = 2
            OTHERS                 = 3.
        IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
          MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
                  WITH SY-MSGV1 SY-MSGV2 SY-MSGV3 SY-MSGV4.
        ENDIF.
        lo_alv->set_table_for_first_display(
           EXPORTING
                       is_layout       = ls_layout
                       i_save          = 'A'
                       is_variant      = w_variant
           CHANGING
                     it_outtab       = tab_of_vblen_status
                     it_fieldcatalog = fieldcat_of_right

                                           ).
      WHEN OTHERS.
    ENDCASE.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "ITEM_DOUBLE_CLICK                   "handle_toolbar
endclass.                    "lcl_controller IMPLEMENTATION

*
CLASS CONTROL_OF_ALV IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD handle_toolbar.
    DATA: ls_toolbar TYPE stb_button.

*    CLEAR ls_toolbar.
    MOVE '&EXCH' TO ls_toolbar-function.                     "#EC NOTEXT
    MOVE 0 TO ls_toolbar-butn_type.
    MOVE ICON_INTENSIFY TO ls_toolbar-icon.
    MOVE 'Подписать и Отправить'(202) TO ls_toolbar-quickinfo.
    MOVE 'Подписать и Отправить' TO ls_toolbar-text.
    MOVE ' ' TO ls_toolbar-disabled.                        "#EC NOTEXT
    APPEND ls_toolbar TO e_object->mt_toolbar.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "handle_toolbar

  METHOD AFTER_USER_COMMAND.
*    MESSAGE '123' TYPE 'I'.
*        CALL METHOD lo_alv->refresh_table_display( ).
    init=>init_container( ).
  ENDMETHOD.
  METHOD USER_COMMAND.
    if e_ucomm = '&EXCH'.
     delete tab_of_vblen_status INDEX 1.
    endif.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.                    "CONTROLL_OF_ALV IMPLEMENTATION

CLASS init IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD init_container.
      CLEAR SCREEN.
      FREE lo_alv.
      FREE obj_tree.
      clear lt_events.
      clear gt_fieldcat.
      FREE left_container.
      FREE right_container.
      if split_cont is NOT INITIAL.
        FREE split_cont.
      endif.
     CREATE OBJECT split_cont
      EXPORTING
        parent                  = cl_gui_container=>screen0
        no_autodef_progid_dynnr = 'X'
        rows                    = 1
        columns                 = 2.

*    split_cont->set_width( width = 2180 ).
    split_cont->SET_COLUMN_WIDTH( id = 1 WIDTH = 13 ).

          left_container = split_cont->get_container( row = 1 column = 1 ).
    right_container = split_cont->get_container( row = 1 column = 2 ).

if obj_tree is INITIAL.
    CREATE OBJECT obj_tree
      EXPORTING
        parent              = left_container
        node_selection_mode = cl_gui_column_tree=>node_sel_mode_single
        NO_HTML_HEADER      = 'X'
        NO_TOOLBAR          = 'X'.

endif.
    call method obj_tree->get_registered_events
      IMPORTING
        events = lt_events.
    l_event-eventid = cl_gui_column_tree=>eventid_node_double_click.
    append l_event to lt_events.
    l_event-eventid = cl_gui_column_tree=>eventid_item_double_CLICK.
    append l_event to lt_events.
    CALL METHOD obj_tree->set_registered_events
      EXPORTING
        events                    = lt_events
      EXCEPTIONS
        cntl_error                = 1
        cntl_system_error         = 2
        illegal_event_combination = 3.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      MESSAGE x208(00) WITH 'ERROR'.                        "#EC NOTEXT
    ENDIF.
    ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'NAME'.
    ls_fieldcat-coltext = 'Кол-во'.
    ls_fieldcat-outputlen = 17.
    ls_fieldcat-seltext = 'Кол-во'.
    ls_fieldcat-datatype = 'INT'.
    ls_fieldcat-intlen = 5.
    ls_fieldcat-decimals = 0.
    APPEND ls_fieldcat TO gt_fieldcat.

    l_hierarchy_header-heading = 'Раздел'(100).
    l_hierarchy_header-width = 35.
    l_hierarchy_header-width_pix = ' '.

    call method obj_tree->set_table_for_first_display
      EXPORTING
        is_hierarchy_header = l_hierarchy_header
      CHANGING
        it_outtab           = lt_of_tree
        IT_FIELDCATALOG     = gt_fieldcat.

    data : gs_fieldcat like LINE OF lt_of_tree.
    ls_layo-EXP_IMAGE ='@FQ@'.
    ls_layo-n_IMAGE = '@FQ@'.
    gs_fieldcat-name =  lines( tab_of_vblen_status ).
    CALL METHOD obj_tree->add_node
      EXPORTING
        i_relat_node_key = p_relat_key
        i_relationship   = cl_gui_column_tree=>relat_last_child
        i_node_text      = 'Загрузка на портал'
        is_node_layout   = ls_layo
        is_outtab_line   = gs_fieldcat
      IMPORTING
        e_new_node_key   = p_node_key.

    ls_layo-EXP_IMAGE ='@BP@'.
    ls_layo-n_IMAGE = '@BP@'.

    CALL METHOD obj_tree->add_node
      EXPORTING
        i_relat_node_key = p_relat_key
        i_relationship   = cl_gui_column_tree=>relat_last_child
        i_node_text      = 'Получено с портала'
        is_node_layout   = ls_layo
      IMPORTING
        e_new_node_key   = p_node_key.


    ls_layo-EXP_IMAGE ='@01@'.
    ls_layo-n_IMAGE = '@01@'.
    data:   l_carrid_key type lvc_nkey.
    l_carrid_key = p_node_key.
    CALL METHOD obj_tree->add_node
      EXPORTING
        i_relat_node_key = l_carrid_key
        i_relationship   = cl_gui_column_tree=>relat_last_child
        i_node_text      = 'Найдены Соответсвия'
        is_node_layout   = ls_layo
      IMPORTING
        e_new_node_key   = p_node_key.

    ls_layo-EXP_IMAGE ='@02@'.
    ls_layo-n_IMAGE = '@02@'.

    CALL METHOD obj_tree->add_node
      EXPORTING
        i_relat_node_key = l_carrid_key
        i_relationship   = cl_gui_column_tree=>relat_last_child
        i_node_text      = 'Соответсвия не найдены'
        is_node_layout   = ls_layo
      IMPORTING
        e_new_node_key   = p_node_key.

    ls_layo-EXP_IMAGE = '@F9@'.
    ls_layo-n_IMAGE = '@F9@'.
    CALL METHOD obj_tree->add_node
       EXPORTING
          i_relat_node_key = p_relat_key
          i_relationship   = cl_gui_column_tree=>relat_last_child
          i_node_text      = 'Лог Загрузки'
*      it_item_layout = ls_layo
          is_node_layout = ls_layo
       importing
          e_new_node_key   = p_node_key.


    ls_layo-EXP_IMAGE ='@01@'.
    ls_layo-n_IMAGE = '@01@'.
    l_carrid_key = p_node_key.
    CALL METHOD obj_tree->add_node
      EXPORTING
        i_relat_node_key = l_carrid_key
        i_relationship   = cl_gui_column_tree=>relat_last_child
        i_node_text      = 'Успешно'
        is_node_layout   = ls_layo
      IMPORTING
        e_new_node_key   = p_node_key.

    ls_layo-EXP_IMAGE ='@02@'.
    ls_layo-n_IMAGE = '@02@'.
    CALL METHOD obj_tree->add_node
      EXPORTING
          i_relat_node_key = l_carrid_key
          i_relationship   = cl_gui_column_tree=>relat_last_child
          i_node_text      = 'Неуспешно'
*      it_item_layout = ls_layo
          is_node_layout = ls_layo
       importing
           e_new_node_key   = p_node_key.


    DATA : mo_controller type ref to lcl_controller.
    CREATE OBJECT mo_controller.
    set HANDLER mo_controller->ITEM_DOUBLE_CLICK FOR obj_tree.

      CREATE OBJECT lo_alv
          EXPORTING
            i_parent = right_container.

        DATA : alv_controller type ref to CONTROL_OF_ALV.
        CREATE OBJECT alv_controller.
        set HANDLER alv_controller->handle_toolbar FOR lo_alv.
        set HANDLER alv_controller->AFTER_USER_COMMAND for lo_alv.
         set HANDLER alv_controller->USER_COMMAND for lo_alv.

    call method obj_tree->frontend_update.
*MODIFY SCREEN.
 CALL METHOD cl_gui_cfw=>flush
      EXCEPTIONS
        cntl_system_error = 1
        cntl_error        = 2.
 MODIFY SCREEN.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "init_container

  METHOD init_tables.
    select * from ZVA_VBELN_STATUS
      into CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE tab_of_vblen_status
      where status = '01'.

  ENDMETHOD.                    "init_tables
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: Unable to upgrade SAP HANA 2305 to SAP HANA 2405
entry.content:
Hi Krish_SAP

Was the upgrade successful or there were errors in upgrade ?

You could reinstall server tools as mentioned in SAP note 2538555 and check issue again after this.

If facing same issue, please create incident using component SBO-BC.

Thank You.

Kind Regards

Nidhi

entry.title: Re: How to enable QR code in SAP Commerce for an Omni-Channel experience?
entry.content:
Hey @rbhagat

thanks for the post.

I think you made a small mistake in your article.

At start of your article you wrote you will use Barcode4j for QR code creation and you put the Barcode4j dependency to your external-dependencies.

But in your code you are using in method generateQRCodeImage the Class QRCodeWriter.
The QRCodeWriter comes from the library ZXing (com.google.zxing.qrcode.QRCodeWriter) what you mentioned as alternative library.

When you want to use the code above you have to add that to your external-dependencies (dont forget to add to you classpath)

	<dependencies>
		<dependency>
		    <groupId>com.google.zxing</groupId>
		    <artifactId>core</artifactId>
		    <version>3.5.3</version>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
		    <groupId>com.google.zxing</groupId>
		    <artifactId>javase</artifactId>
		    <version>3.5.3</version>
		</dependency>
	</dependencies>

entry.title: Re: How to use MAN_CALL to send other document than MSDS
entry.content:
Hello

you should not use the same report category "MSDS" and you should avoid to use the same business process as with MSDS (e.g. to get a difference e.g. in "CoverSheet" etc.)

I propose the following sequence

1.) check customizing. Here you can define the "cover sheet". Here you will find all the conditions which are allowed in Standard to define a "different" cover sheet; check the options you have there (e.g. you can differentiate by "sales organisation")

2.) you should not mix a "non SDS" like document with "MSDS" as report category. You should specify may be a customer specific report type to assign to the generation variant

3.) check may be: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ERP/e3e7c06560a54d14ba7f4c52a86635da/352bbf53f106b44ce10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US

and the relevant OSS note describing the "report distribution"; this is a "consulting OSS" note. You will find this easily on SAP marketplace

Wish you the best

C.B

entry.title: Reset MFA/2FA: Unable to access Cloud Portal for SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

One of my teammates is unable to login into Cloud Portal due to continuous error during MFA. Could you please help to reset the authentication process for its account?

Thanks in advance!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Reset MFA/2FA: Unable to access Cloud Portal for SAP...
entry.content:
Hello!

As per the KBA 3383780 - Mandatory MFA in Cloud Portal - SAP Commerce Cloud, you can reset the MFA/2FA device by having a CUSTOMER_SYS_ADMIN delete & re-create the affected user!

More information on Cloud Portal's roles can be found in Roles in the Cloud Portal.

Kind Regards,
Wesley

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello, thank you for reaching out to us. Unfortunately, we do not have a custom "draw" function available. However, you can refer to the following help blog for guidance on implementing a custom JavaScript function.

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/custom-javascript?locale=en-US&q=custom

entry.title: Re: Manage Preferred Supplier List
entry.content:
Good day Peter,

As per KBA 3488313 - Scope Item Deprecation Retired List 2408 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition scope item 4RI:Preferred Supplier List is no longer available resulting in the app Manage Preferred Supplier List being removed. When you open the excel included in the KBA you see that no Successor has been identified and the reason given is that there are no live customers using this scope item. It was strategic decision of product management to offer 4RI and 4RD only in OP/Private cloud environment. 

If you like to discuss in more detail please do not hesitate to reach out to me via email.

Best regards, Esther

entry.title: Where can I start learning how to create logistics projects in SAP S/4HANA EPPM Project System?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Exploring Logistics Projects in SAP S/4HANA learning journey.

Overview
In this Learning Journey you will learn how to create, plan and execute logistics projects in SAP S/4HANA EPPM Project System. You will experience the end-to-end business process, from creation of projects structures, planning of costs, materials and revenues, to execution of projects, realization of revenues, results analysis and period-end closing.

Learning objectives

Upon completing this Learning Journey you will be able to:

  • Create logistics projects using templates.
  • Create and maintain networks and activities within Work Breakdown Structures (WBS).
  • Carry out cost and revenue planning of logistics projects.
  • Carry out material procurement for logistics projects.
  • Release and execute logistics projects.
  • Run period-end closing activities including results analysis and settle projects to profitability analysis.
  • Use reporting features in SAP S/4HANA to analyzes structure, revenues, costs and contribution margin of logistics projects.

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: PO versioning in CIG component
entry.content:
Hi JashShah,

the error message we receive is "Order version of the cancellation order is not the same as the original order: The original order has version (1), while the cancellation order has version (2).

I understand the logic behind. As soon as we do any change in our SAP system, version number is increased in the background. But in those cases change PO is not sent because our backend system does not consider this change to be relevant. Therefore with the next step, PO cancellation, the message is sent with higher version number 2. 

We just can't imagine that all partners do send all changes to Ariba Network, even in case of internal changes. This is why we are asking for best practices or experiences with similar situations.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Debugger: organize the screen
entry.content: Thank you Ulrich, it worked!

entry.title: Re: Client-secret change in every CAP app deploy
entry.content: i am not sure if you get the point, if your app and service are developed in one mta, you don't need destination for it. for stable key, you can manually create key and put them in your destination.

entry.title: Re: PO versioning in CIG component
entry.content: Hi TobiaszWegrzynski. Thank you for your comment. Yes, for both change and new messages the proper settings are done in WE20.

entry.title: DMS: Scan and attach document
entry.content:
Experts,

I have a requirement to scan a document from scanner tray and directly upload in DMS. I searched the forum and found threads which suggested to download Easy DMS from marketplace. 

Currently, I scan the document using a scanner software for Fujitsu scanner, save the file in my desktop as a first step and then attach the document to Business partner via DMS as a second step.

Instead of 2 steps, users wants to directly upload the document from the scanner tray and upload to DMS. 

I believe OpenText is a paid solution from SAP which might help in this regard. Since I just want to attach the document to BP, is there any other alternative option which does not need any 3rd party paid software.

Kindly share your inputs if this requirement is feasible. 

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: Re: Client-secret change in every CAP app deploy
entry.content: If I deployed my app to PRD subaccount, I would created service-key manually. I should do it manually.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2020 Licensing
entry.content:
This has a lot of great info so book mark this page:

https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/crystal-reports/faq

1. How does the licensing issue work in both developer mode and deployment mode?

CR has always been a single use license, so you can purchase a copy of CR Designer per user.

More info here:

https://www.sap.com/documents/2015/07/368edae4-597c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html

2. Is the issue of concurrent licenses limited as was the case with crystal 8.5?

For CR Server or BOE Enterprise where you publish reports to those platforms you can get Concurrent or User based keycodes to allow/limit the number of users able to log into those applications. Does not limit the use of CR Designer if CR Designer is installed locally.

3.What platforms does Crystal Reports 2020 run on?

See this Platforms info here:

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2859510

Crystal Reports 2020

4. On what platforms can deployment be done (Web, Mac, Windows, Linux, etc.)?

CR Designer is a Windows based application, so Windows OS's only.

You can get Crystal Reports Viewer that is WEB based, only allows users to view reports with saved data.

If you want to develop an application using CR's SDK's then you can build the App as a Desktop Or WEB hosted application using RESTful, .NET or Java SDK's

Go here for more info:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CRYSTAL_REPORTS

entry.title: Re: How can MRP exception messages and reschedule dates i...
entry.content: Hello @Chandrashekhar_Sajjan - If I understand correctly, goal of these messages is to identify supply orders which need to be either scheduled to future (i.e., pushed), scheduled closer to the present day (i.e., pulled), or removed as unnecessary (i.e., canceled). Do you know exactly what is the business requirement or where we  want to see these messages because it is just a list of values (i.e. code and descriptions) ?

entry.title: (SAP BEST practice) Cutover process : Activating batch for material
entry.content:
Hi Team 

We are activating batch for material . 

Will like to know the cutover plan suggested by SAP for the same.
Will also like to know how to handle pending invoices ?

entry.title: Precondition is not working in Maintain validation and Substitution rules app when data comes API
entry.content:
Maintain validation and substitution rules app with Precondition working in Manual both in Starter and Customizing System but when we trigger data from API precondition is not working. 

Note: Without precondition this rule working fine from API as well . Is there any way to handle the precondition when data comes from API?

entry.title: Selecting fields from ProductTreeLines inside a ProductTree query with Service Layer API
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm just starting to work with Service Layer, and I found myself with a requirement to filter the fields returned by the Service Layer API.

In this case, we are querying the ProductTrees endpoint, which respond also with the ProductTreeLines.

But we don't want all the ProductTreeLines fields to be responded by the server, we want a subset only.

I know how to select the fields we want from the main entity (ProductTree) using the $select query param, but I'm strugling to select specific fields from the child object (ProductTreeLine).

Is there a way to do this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2020 Licensing
entry.content:
I'll answer 3 and 4 first because they are the easiest.  Crystal Reports 2020 runs on Windows only.  This is a change from older versions of Crystal Reports.  This applies to both the Crystal Reports Developer and any hosting platform.

Now for licensing, always a sand trap with Business Objects and Crystal Reports.

For developing, there is a user based licensing model.  For each user who uses the Crystal Reports Development tool, they need a license and their own license key.  Depending on the vendor where you get your licenses, these can be purchased in blocks of differing numbers of licenses.

For what you refer to as "deployment mode", I assume you are referring to some platform to host the Crystal Reports and allows users to interact with them by refreshing them and possibly scheduling them.  There are two options, Crystal Reports Server and Business Objects.  I don't know much about Crystal Reports Server as we use Business Objects at my company.  Business Objects is a server installation that allows for the hosting and scheduling of Crystal Reports.  It is currently licensed based on a concurrent or named user model.  What fits best with you installation will need to be determined by you.

I don't know of any limits on concurrent licenses as they would relate to Crystal Reports server or Business Objects.  Those licenses do not allow for editing or creating reports.  There is not a concurrent user license model for the Crystal Reports developer.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hi team,

Please find the screenshots below,

All entries

With filer

Regards
Siva G

entry.title: Hash function in SAP IQ
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,
We need to do column level encryption testing basis below methods.

Method 1: AesEncrypt & AesDerypt function based Encryption 
Create views on the base tables and implement AES encryption and decryption functions (AesEncrypt and AesDecrypt) within these views.

Method 2: Hash-Based Encryption
Create views on the base tables and apply HASH functions, such as SHA-1 or SHA-256, within these views.
We need to know how second approach can be implemented here. Can we use hash functions in IQ and since it is not native to IQ how will be the performance?.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Hash function in SAP IQ
entry.content:
Dear Customer ,

Regarding Method 1, I tested HASH function in IQ.

Example : "select UPPER(HASH(CAST((Surname) as VARCHAR(150)), 'SHA-256')) from employees where EmployeeID >= 120"

I can confirm it is not IQ native. The query plan generated is SQL Anywhere plan, not IQ.

See KBA 2271520 How to know if a query is processed by SAP IQ or SQL Anywhere - SAP IQ

Thus performance may be impacted (KBA 2305300 - Hash function in SAP IQ)

The alternative and recommended solution is Method 1 :

Use IQ column encryption with native functions AES_ENCRYPT and AES_DECRYPT 

See

Column Encryption in SAP IQ

KBA 2531882 - How to set up column encryption in SAP IQ 16.x  

Kind Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
@Dhanush-d it is great to engage with you in the community. My name is Stephanie and I'm based in the USA outside of Philadelphia (the city of brotherly love.) May I ask your area of expertise and interest? When you can please check out the location based groups to join. Also, members run fantastic local events. Asia Pacific | Location-Based Groups | SAP Community

PS don't forget to register for SAP TechEd and to block your calendar as you are able Oct 8 & 9 for interactive sessions. Bring your questions to get answered!! SAP TechEd - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: @RakeshNair hi, hope that you are having a great week. Definitely join the SAP TechEd - SAP Community to stay informed, engage with others during your preparation and get ideas for great interactive session!

entry.title: Re: Transport Custom Workflow from development to quality...
entry.content:
Hi George,

I've always transported WFs to QA and on to Prod with transport requests (using SE09 or SE10).   Were you prompted to create a transport when you were developing this workflow?   Have other custom WFs been created/transported from this client in the past?

If you were not prompted to enter/create a transport request when you first saved your WF, then I'd check with the Basis team.  You should NOT create workflows in QA or Prod.  

Good luck,

Sue

 

Sue

entry.title: Re: How to put the BPM Governance Building Blocks to good use
entry.content:
Hi Taryn;

Your blog post offers an excellent guide to implementing good governance in Business Process Management (BPM). It effectively outlines practical steps such as establishing process maps, leveraging existing tools and methodologies, and focusing on data-driven analytics. The emphasis on creating a standard taxonomy and continuous monitoring is particularly insightful.

I’m excited to read your next blog on the Process Management Lifecycle and tooling—your approach promises to provide even more valuable insights.

entry.title: Can we filter for null values in Fiori elements?
entry.content:
I have a Fiori elements app, using a CDS based v2 OData service. One of the filters is a date field, and I would like to apply a filter where Date is null (empty, no value present). Setting the filters as <empty> using the default value help generates an OData request with the right format.

$filter=SalesOrganization eq '1000' and BookingInDate eq null

The result is no rows.

When I look for a particular document, which I know has an empty date, this is what I see in the console.

 

{
...
"BookingInDate":null
...
}

 

 The table has null, the OData service returns null, the filter applies null, but for some reason these nulls are not treated as equal when filtering.

Does anyone have any suggestions on how to filter for null dates?

We are casting null as a default date value (01-01-1900), and then filtering for this value to see rows that match. Surely there has to be a better way, right?

entry.title: India TCS Form 27EQ - Remmitance Challan Issue
entry.content:
Hello,

We've posted a customer invoice with the TCS withholding tax codes maintained in the master data. But when we are trying to create the "Remittance Challan - TCS (Customers)", we are getting an error message the "No unpaid tax line exists for the given selection criteria" after providing the necessary details in the selection screen. The Business place and section codes have been given at the time of invoicing, the withholding is also getting calculated for customer invoices but the documents are not getting picked up at the time of "Remmitance".

Note,

All the configurations related to TCS and Extended withholding tax has been configured in the "Sandbox" system. The Business Place is also maintained and is assigned to the section codes. 

Can anyone please help us in resolving this issue. 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Transport Custom Workflow from development to quality...
Re: Transport Custom Workflow from development to quality...
entry.content:
Hello Sue, thank you for the quick reply.

Yes I was prompted to create a transport request when I first saved my workflow and I created one. Then this transport request was ''transported'' with se10.
But the transport had inside this:

View Maintenance: Data

SWFDVEVTY2

SWFDEVENA

100BOBUS2030 CREATED WS9980

SWFDEVTYP

100BOBUS2030 CREATED WS9980


No, I think it's the first time that a workflow template is transported from development to quality server.
When I create one I save it as Local (without a specific package, is this maybe the problem?)

entry.title: Re: POD flow with movement 631
entry.content:
Check if this can be resolved with the following notes 

3403643 - VLPOD : Error M7443 during cancellation of Outbound delivery - SAP for Me

entry.title: Fund Budget check to disable for particular GL account in ECC Funds Management
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

could you please help on this 
I don't want to have a budget check on a GL for now, later i want to have budget check on the same GL?

is it possible in FM?

 

Regards,

Johnny

entry.title: Re: How to delete/remove SM58 TRFC failed entries using transaction ID
entry.content: Thank a lot.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - EWM Goods Receipt Failed
entry.content:
is HU internally created or coming from other system -- You may want to review the number range you set up for HU.

Refer GS1-128 Barcode Understanding and Technical Detail... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Vendor Master Workflow is not triggered successfully
entry.content:
If you can recreate this scenario in your Dev environment, you can temporarily change any of the background tasks to be dialog, with yourself as the agent. Then set a breakpoint within the method (perhpas Get VM items) and you can debug to your hearts content. But of course, don't forget to switch the task BACK to a background task and save. It would not be good to transport that to a different environment.

Also, if you cannot recreate the scenario in Dev, you can still set a breakpoint in the Get VM items method, and debug from the BOR.  This might not show you everything you need if the master data is changed, but it's a place to start.

entry.title: Customer & Partner Roundtable for SAP BTP ABAP Environment #16
entry.content:
👉 The call for contributions for one of the upcoming roundtables is open! 

 

If you want to show a demo or share a use case scenario for SAP BTP ABAP Environment send us an email and we will get back to you.
 

Introduction

 

As SAP BTP ABAP environment (aka Steampunk) and ABAP Cloud became more and more popular inside and outside of SAP, there is a high demand for rolling out the latest product news and updates, asking questions, and of course showing demos. 

💡 If you weren’t able to join one of our previous roundtables, you can find the slides presented, recordings, and further references in this GitHub repository.


Meeting Information

When:                                                                      
  • September 19th, 10:00 - 11:00 AM CET  – Zoom Meeting (please register in advance) 
 
Who:
  • All interested customers, partners, and stakeholders are invited to join and exchange ideas and feedback with others and the product team
  • Steampunk team: Frank Jentsch (Product Lead for SAP BTP ABAP Environment), Iwona Hahn & Burcu Karlidag (Product Management), Timm Falter (Area Product Owner for Data Integration and CDS), and Arne Harren (Architect in the Data Integration and CDS area).

Preliminary Agenda:
  • Product news
  • SQL-based Data Integration with SQL Services and CDS External Entities incl. demo
  • Q&A
Looking forward to meeting you!
 


Check out our SAP Business Technology ABAP Environment page in SAP Community for product updates and upcoming events.

entry.title: Re: Issue in PO while sending the data to JDBC postgreSQl DB
entry.content:
Hi Ryan,

Thanks for your response.

PostgreSql by default converts everything to lower case(Table Names and Column Names).However PostgreSQL schema has case sensitive table and column names. When we try to push data from SAP to PostgreSQL we are seeing an error like Table name does not exists. Eg: postgreSQL Table name: countryCode but SAP PO postgre connection is trying to find countrycode


We need SAP PO to find table name as countryCode as is


Please suggest if can use any parameters in the JDBC postgreSQL connection string or if there is way to define double quote("") for the table and column names for the data types or anywhere else etc.,

We are currently using the above datatype for which is connected to SQLDB and is working as expected.

Now we are using the same structure for sending data to postgreSQL DB its failing and we have checked our driver installation & config and channel configuration is good.

As per DB team info, if we can send data as "Office"(Table Name) and "OfficeName"(Column Name) in double quote then they able to see/receive data.

So is there any way that we can add double quotes for table and column names for DataTypes.

Else please suggest any solution for this issue.

Thanks,

Vidya.

entry.title: Re: Difference between SAP S/4HANA :Public Vs Private edition : RISE with SAP
entry.content: Really excellent article! Congratulations!! Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Public cloud transport from on premise 1909

entry.title: Re: Issue in PO while sending the data to JDBC postgreSQl DB
entry.content:
Hello!
Could you please show us the definition of “message mapping”. I think the error may be caused by the naming of the fields.

entry.title: Error while performing automated test cases
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I’m currently working on the automated test’s in the TDD-System of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

By using the standard automated test cases for some Scope Items (e.g. BD9, 1EZ, 1F1) in CALM there always occurs an error as shown below.

How can I counteract this? Do further settings need to be made here?

Thanks for your support.

Best regards

Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Future of SAP Landscape Management
entry.content:

and
"SAP Landscape Management Cloud becomes the automation solution for customer-operated SAP landscapes beyond 2027. "

is no more with the announcement  https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-landscape-management-cloud-discontinued/ba-p/13759530

entry.title: Re: Issue in PO while sending the data to JDBC postgreSQl DB
entry.content:
I would try this SQL_QUERY option to see if it solves your case sensitivity problem - https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw73ehp1/7.31.19/en-US/44/7b7855fde93673e10000000a114a6b/content.htm?no_cache=true

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: SAP HANA Native Logging
entry.content:
(very new to SAP HANA, so apologies if my wording is not accurate!)

Looking for a clean (best) way to change the default logging method, and/or the current logging method in SAP HANA.  I can use the SQL cmd:

ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'system')
set ('auditing configuration', 'global_auditing_state') = 'true';

to enable logging, but is there a SYSTEM command to set or change the audit trail target type, e.g., from CSV to Table? I see that I can do this on the policy level, but I don't see it on the system level.

Does this have to be done via the Admin Console?  I am using SAP HANA Studio ver 2.3.76

entry.title: In ALV When clicked on button of a cell, other cell populate some value (SY-DATUM)
entry.content:
Hi all,

In my ALV report output I have 3 columns, here two are editable. For one column we had a button and when we click on that in same row of second column need to fetch SY-DATE and third column is going to have a manual entry. How we can implement this logic.

entry.title: Re: Answer to tutorial question in SAP Build
entry.content: Hello, Thank you for reaching out to us. The correct answer should be 031200016034. I also tried the same, It seems this may be a bug. I recommend skipping this step and proceeding with the exercise.

entry.title: Re: Determine class structure / components (local class, test classes, ...)
entry.content: The content of this database table is "encoded". Use the ABAP statement READ REPORT to read the source code of CCAU, CCDEF, etc.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to log/track those who used PA20 to view sensitive information?
entry.content: yes

entry.title: Re: JV(Joint Venture) Fields for Profit Center
entry.content: Hi kumar , I have already posted my questions here. https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/mdg-f-profit-center-replicate-joint-venture-fields/qaq-p/12113175/comment-id/4842613#M4842613 For which entity type you have added the joint venture fields?

entry.title: Add a walk in delegate to a class by External ID
entry.content:
Hi,

The "User ID" and "External ID" values in our Learning environment do not match in many cases. We have mapped "External ID" to their employee number and "User ID" is their SF generated number. As their employee number is widely recognised in the business, we'd like for Instructors to be able to add walk in delegates by being able to search for their "External ID" insttead of their "User ID".

Can this be configured, and if so how?

Bryan

entry.title: Re: Can't see Open Rejected Envelopes
entry.content:
Hi, I would suggest making sure the user experiencing this issue is part of the Recover Rejected Envelopes group in the correct realm. If you're in that group in Test but the event is in Prod you'll not see the correct option, for example. 

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: xfp output of Adobe form to be converted pdf
entry.content: The PDF displays correctly via SP01, right? ABAP can run SP01 too (via CALL TRANSACTION).

entry.title: Re: How to merge DMS object (eg. PDF/JPEG) to an Adobe fo...
entry.content: Did you get the solution?

entry.title: Re: xfp output of Adobe form to be converted pdf
entry.content: If your question is how to display PDF right after generating it, you have all the parameters you need in FP_JOB_OPEN (PREVIEW, GETPDF, etc.)

entry.title: Re: Can we filter for null values in Fiori elements?
entry.content: Yes, the CDS data preview shows 00-00-0000. And if the filter is applied as = null, the correct rows are displayed.

entry.title: Re: How to integrate BTP DMS with SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello Malar,

Thank you for reaching out to us. Could you please provide more details about the issue you're encountering, including a screenshot and a brief explanation? This information will be helpful for further investigating and resolving the issue.

entry.title: Re: Questions regarding Sucessfactors - Common super domain activation
entry.content: Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites, it's reserved to issues with SAP Community, Support and so on. Better post to Technology Q&A (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions). Hopefully, an admin would fix it for you.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I am a senior student in major Management Information Systems. I have a direction to have a intern job regarding SAP. Therefore, it is very important for me to have as much as knowledge in this field. I also have completed some courses in learning.sap.com before and 1 TS410 certificate. Now I really want to have chances to get other certificates that will helps me have a reliable resume in employers' eyes.

Thank you,

Vy Nguyen

entry.title: SAPUI5 ODataListBinding.create duplicates entries
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

I am building an SAPUI5 application based on OData V2 build with SEGW.

I am facing a weird behavior: In a sap.m.Table my created entries are duplicated after submitting and refreshing.

The table is defined like this:

<Table
    id="KeyfToSourceTable"
    mode="{= ${keyfEdit>/editing} ? 'MultiSelect' : 'None' }"
    items="{
        path: '/MapKeyfSourceSet'
    }" >
    <headerToolbar>
        <OverflowToolbar>
        <Title text="Table" level="H3" />
        <ToolbarSpacer />
            <Button
                icon="sap-icon://add"
                press=".onDatasourceHelpRequested"
                visible="{keyfEdit>/editing}" />
            <Button
                icon="sap-icon://delete"
                press=".onDatasourceDeletePressed"
                visible="{keyfEdit>/editing}" />
        
        </OverflowToolbar>
    </headerToolbar>
    <columns>
        <Column>
            <Text text="Sourcestxt" />
        </Column>
        <Column>
            <Text text="Employeetext" />
        </Column>
        <Column>
            <Text text="SbTxtlg" />
        </Column>
    </columns>
    <items>
        <ColumnListItem vAlign="Middle">
            <cells>
                <ObjectIdentifier
                    title="{Sourcestxt}"/>
                <Text
                    text="{Employeetext}" />
                <Text
                    text="{SbTxtlg}" />
            </cells>
        </ColumnListItem>
    </items>
</Table>

It displays entities mapped to my main object. So I filter these at runtime (and sometimes I have to rebind the table):

var sourceSystemTable = this.byId("KeyfToSourceTable");
var keyfId = this.getView().getBindingContext().getProperty("Keyfid");
var filterArray = [new Filter("Keyfid", FilterOperator.EQ, keyfId)];
sourceSystemTable.bindItems({path:"/MapKeyfSourceSet", template: oldTemplate, filters: new Filter(filterArray, true)})

The User should be able to edit the main object and the mapping table and just save at the end. But the table should display the new entries, which are not persisted yet. Therefore I use the ODataListBinding.create function like it is discribed in the documentation:

this.byId("KeyfToSourceTable").getBinding("items").create(oEntry, {
    inactive : false,
    success: function(data) {
        alert("success createdMapping");
    },
    error: function(data) {
        alert("error createdMapping");
    }
});

It works as designed, new Entries are shown and not persisted until the user clicks "save" and submitChanges() is called.

But after a refresh() is called or the Binding of the table is changed, the new entries are duplicated. They are added at the top of the table again. I already looked at the BindingContexts of the items and the binding of the table, the bindings seem absolutly the same.

Even when I look at a differend main object and the filter doesn't seem to work for these duplicates. They also appear at the top of the table. But looking at the binding and also getting the filterted property, they shouldn't be there. These duplicates don't exists in the backend/data base tables. They also all are not transient, so I am not able to filter them by myself.

I assume these duplicates are just in the client model.

I appreciate any help,
Kind regards

Tobias

entry.title: Comparison of SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office (SAC edition) vs. SAC add-in for Microsoft Excel
entry.content:
The SAP Analytics Cloud license includes two Microsoft Excel add-ins: the strategic SAP Analytics Cloud add-in for Microsoft Excel and SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office (SAC edition). The SAP Analytics Cloud add-in for Microsoft Excel is automatically updated and primarily focuses on the latest SAP solutions, like SAP Analytics Cloud and Datasphere. On the other hand, SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office excels at accessing SAP BW and BPC. This blog provides a comparison of their features and functionalities.

 

Installation

Both add-ins are integral components of the SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Enterprise subscription. To use them, end users must log in to their SAP Analytics Cloud tenant.

The SAC Excel add-in is an Office add-in that offers cross-platform compatibility and centralized deployment and distribution. End users can directly install it from the Microsoft Store or, for centralized deployment, through the Microsoft 365 admin center. It supports Microsoft Excel 365 (Desktop and Web) and Microsoft Excel 2021 on Windows and macOS. Once installed, the "SAP Analytics Cloud" ribbon becomes visible within Excel. New features are automatically released to end users monthly, eliminating the need for dedicated installations. Patches may be deployed more frequently. The roadmap is available on SAP's roadmap explorer. For more information, please refer to the SAP Help and What's New pages.

The SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office (AFO) (SAC edition) installer must be downloaded from the SAP Software Download Center and then installed on the end user's machine. Microsoft Excel 2016 (Desktop) or later is required. The Excel ribbon will display the "Analysis" and "Analysis Design" tabs. A new service pack with customer bug fixes is released every quarter. There are no plans for new features, and mainstream maintenance is scheduled to end in late 2029 (as per the Product Availability Matrix). There are two versions of Analysis for Office: the AFO SAC edition and the Standard Edition. This blog highlights the key differences between these two versions.

 

Workbook design and storage

After authenticating with SAP Analytics Cloud and inserting a cross-tab based on a data source, the side panel can be used in both add-ins to design the workbook. Measures can be filtered, and dimensions can be added or removed from the rows and columns of a cross-tab. Multiple cross-tabs with different data sources can be used within a single workbook in both add-ins. Cross-tabs can be copied and pasted to other sheets, and undo/redo functionality is supported. Additionally, all standard Microsoft Excel features can be applied to cross-tabs.

For the SAP Analytics Cloud Excel add-in, the primary focus is on cloud data sources. It always uses the connections defined in the SAP Analytics Cloud connection management. While SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office can utilize some SAP Analytics Cloud live connections, it also has the flexibility to connect directly to the source system.

The following table provides an overview of the most relevant SAP data sources:

Data sourceSAC Excel add-inAnalysis for Office (SAC edition)
SAP Analytics Cloud New ModelYesNo
SAP Datasphere Analytic ModelYesNo
SAP S/4HANA Public CloudYesYes
SAP HANA Cloud YesYes (HANA Analytics Adapter needed)
SAP BW and BW/4HANAYes (Tunnel connection)Yes
SAP S/4HANAYes (Tunnel connection)Yes
SAP BPCNoYes
SAP HANANoYes

The final workbook can be stored locally or on Microsoft SharePoint, just like a standard Excel file, and shared with other users. Both add-ins also offer the option to store workbooks in SAP Analytics Cloud and leverage its collaboration features. Additionally, SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office (AFO) workbooks can be stored on SAP BW and SAP BI BusinessObjects Platform. When opening an existing workbook, both add-ins allow you to configure whether it should be automatically refreshed with new data or if manual triggering is required.

 

Analyze data

Both add-ins offer robust data analysis capabilities, including filtering through variable prompts or member selectors, ranking and sorting, hierarchical navigation, and property and totals display. Additionally, users can format data, set thresholds to highlight key values, and create Excel-based calculations within added rows or columns. Analysis for Office offers additional capabilities, such as creating custom calculations on top of data sources and defining style sets to ensure consistent formatting across workbooks. 

To enhance flexibility and customization, both add-ins support formula mode, allowing for highly adaptable and formatted reports beyond the traditional table-based layout. Furthermore, they enable data write-back formulas to planning-enabled data sources.

Due to its distinct technology, Analysis for Office offers APIs that can be utilized in VBA to automate specific functions, such as setting filters or modifying and refreshing cross-tabs. This capability is currently unavailable in Office add-ins, making it a significant limitation for migrating from AFO workbooks to SAC Excel add-in workbooks. Additionally, Analysis for Office benefits from partner solutions (APOS, BIExcellence) that can pre-calculate workbooks and distribute the results via email or as PDFs. 

 

Planning support

The SAC Excel add-in is specifically designed for SAC Planning. The planning data is directly written back into the SAP Analytics Cloud model, which can be hosted either within SAP Analytics Cloud or SAP Datasphere. Additionally, workbooks can be linked to SAC calendar tasks and data actions can be triggered directly within the workbook. In an upcoming release, the add-in will also support viewing and adding data point comments, to further enhance collaboration and transparency.

Analysis for Office excels at integrating with SAP BPC and SAP BW IP Planning solutions. Comments can be stored directly within BW and Planning functions and sequences can be executed from the add-in using the side panel or VBA.

entry.title: Re: Future of SAP Landscape Management
entry.content:
Dear @mrc,

That is correct which is why we instantly updated this post at the top with the latest announcement. We didn't want to delete the previous content.

Kind regards,
Marco Dorn
Product Manager

entry.title: Re: will pMRP consider open sales order and Production or...
entry.content:
Hello 

I think those are questions that you can answer by yourself, if you properly test pMRP in the system. Try to create your own simulations, explore the different parameters, create new production orders and the observe if there is any change in the work center capacity. 

Best regards,
Caetano

entry.title: calculate version variance dynamically based on three table in SAC stories
entry.content:
Hi all,

What I want to achieve: I have three tables on my storypage. The first two tables called (trend and trend comparison, see Screenshot) have  a slider for cutoverdate and a calculated inputcontrol to select the version for the distinct table (in the left on the screenshot).My third table(called Trend variance,see screenshot) should be calculated based what displays table 1 and table 2. The logic for the values should be like this.

Table3("trend variance")= Table1 ("trend")-Table2 ("trend comparison").

Tables 1 and Table  differ in cutover date for actuals/forecast versions and selected version,

Do you have some suggestions how this is possible in SAC? My first idea was to try it with a calculated dimension based on version, but it didnt worked(screenshot 2)

SAP Analytics Cloud

Hi @sheenamk  & @Shilpa4 

Task 1 Details -

CDS View Entity Data Preview

Logic in the ABAP class. In specific, the field ‘Status’ should only have values ( O, A or X ).

Please let me know your feedback.

Raju

entry.title: Re: Can we filter for null values in Fiori elements?
entry.content: It should be set to BookingInDate eq '00-00-0000'.

entry.title: Re: BTP精选内容目录
entry.content: xiexie

entry.title: Re: How to use MAN_CALL to send other document than MSDS
entry.content: Thanks Chrsitophe, I will take a look deeply to config doc. I also found this note 1055007 which seems to be used full. Regards. Daman

entry.title: OR01 Tri-Met Transit Tax and OR07 Multnomah County Tax
entry.content:
We have a work location in North Portland which falls into the Tri-Met District which allows employer tax calculations for the OR01 Tri-Met Transit Tax.  Recently new hires have been assigned to OR07 Multnomah (Pre School for All, county tax), via BSI TaxProfileFactory.  This prevents the ER transit tax from calculating and causes quarterly reporting issues.

I noted a previous communication around the transit tax and reviewed note 3071303 - Multnomah County and Metro District City Oregon Taxes.  The note provides the solution to use tax authority OR31 Metro District (city tax).  The note addresses OR31 Metro District, Supportive Housing Services tax for wages earned in the city.

However, there is no reference to OR07 Multnomah which is a county tax.  This tax has a 1.5% tax rate on income above 200K.  Is there a separate solution to address this tax?

OR01  00410101 Tri-Met Trans. District (Other)
OR07  00410107 Multnomah (County)
OR31  00410109 Metro District (City)

entry.title: Re: Transport Custom Workflow from development to quality...
entry.content: I fixed the problem. It was saved as a local object (it cannot be transported to other servers). It had to be saved at a package. The problem is that now only the template gets transported without the tasks inside (there are not custom ones, its one email notification task). How can I involve them in the transport request? If you know any help would be appreciated. Thank you

entry.title: Re: Can we filter for null values in Fiori elements?
entry.content: The value help provides a datepicker and it only accepts valid dates from the calendar. there is no possibility to type 00-00-0000

entry.title: Re: SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office - Standard vs. SAP Analytics Cloud edition
entry.content:
Hi Axel,

SAC Live connections always trigger a SAC logon. Therefore it might take some more time to connect. In case connection information changes you don't need to replace this in the workbook and just change the SAC live connection. For direct connection you would need to do a system replacement in each workbook. Direct connections don't need a SAC logon and are needed for pre-calculation of workbooks. 

Regards,

Steffen

entry.title: Want to learn how to integrate SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central with SAP HCM for SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Integrating SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central with SAP HCM for SAP S/4HANA learning journey.

Overview
The learning journey provides you with an overview of the main integration technology and implementation skills required when integrating SAP SuccessFactors with SAP S/4HANA.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, consultants will be able to perform and configure the integration within SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central, SAP Cloud Integration middleware and SAP S/4HANA as well as access the resources and support available to support the integration.

Prerequisites

  • Getting Started with SAP HCM and HCM Payroll
  • Configuring SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Hi @Shilpa_Shankar ,

Please find the below data preview.

entry.title: Re: Transport Custom Workflow from development to quality...
entry.content:
Hi,

I would copy the standard email task to a customer task.  This should include the task into the transport request.

PS: There are a ton of threads on this site related to transporting WF task and templates.  Perhaps you should search by the SAP task that you are trying to transport (if the above approach doesn't work).

entry.title: Re: Getting error while saving section description under manage templates for performance form.
entry.content: This normally happens to us, when using images as the start of the section description (eg: as banners). I normally have to go delete a paragraph and re-enter it to be able to save. this is a recurrent issue for us as well. Manageable by alas...

entry.title: Re: Range prompt parameter hyperlink in Web Intelligence...
entry.content: Look into the Authorized URLs option for the Web Intelligence application.  This feature was added in SP3 or SP4.  This MIGHT be the issue.  Just a guess.

entry.title: Auto Packing in Public Cloud through RF Gun
entry.content:
Guru,

I am implementing SAP EWM in Public Cloud. I can do auto packing from Inbound Delivery which is in my Desktop. System will create multiple HU based on packing instruction. However I need same functionality through RF gun during Inbound process.
